title: commit and push
description:
#+begin_src shell :var ISSUE=pick-issue-id :results output :tangle no
   cd /Users/shinyobjectz/Apps/workbooks
   git add apps/watershed packages/broker/worker/test/security
   git commit -m "watershed: <one-line summary>

   <body referencing $ISSUE and test deltas>

   Closes $ISSUE."
   git push origin main
   #+end_src
